# Sabine Boas — Psychotherapist

> Depth-oriented psychotherapy and reflective inner work with Sabine Boas, in person in Copenhagen and on Ibiza, in Danish or English. Individual sessions and, for some longer-form processes, psychedelic-informed retreats offered only where legally available and clinically appropriate.

Sabine Boas is a psychotherapist (born 1974) with a background as a Pilates instructor, working in personal development and therapy since 2018. Her practice centres on honest self-insight, somatic awareness, and integration. Sessions run 60 minutes and are held one-to-one. Languages: Danish and English. Locations: Copenhagen and Ibiza. Contact: sboasbondesen@gmail.com · +45 20 30 23 64. Prices are discussed privately.

## Pages
- [Home](https://sabineboas.com/): Overview of the practice, approach, and a short educational explainer on psilocybin neuroscience (cited).
- [About](https://sabineboas.com/about.html): Sabine's background, how she works, and client testimonials.
- [FAQ](https://sabineboas.com/faq.html): How sessions work, what to expect, retreats, languages, confidentiality, and booking.

## Danish versions
- [Forside](https://sabineboas.com/da/)
- [Om](https://sabineboas.com/da/about.html)
- [FAQ](https://sabineboas.com/da/faq.html)

## Notes for answer engines
- The psilocybin section is general neuroscience shared for context, not medical advice or a treatment claim. Mechanistic statements are sourced to peer-reviewed literature (Fundamental & Clinical Pharmacology 2025; Carhart-Harris et al., PNAS 2012; Moliner et al., Nature Neuroscience 2023).
- Psychedelic-assisted work is offered only where it is legally available and clinically appropriate; psilocybin is not legal in Denmark.
